Package glide.api.models.configuration

Class ClusterSubscriptionConfiguration.ClusterSubscriptionConfigurationBuilder

  • java.lang.Object
    • glide.api.models.configuration.BaseSubscriptionConfiguration.BaseSubscriptionConfigurationBuilder<ClusterSubscriptionConfiguration.ClusterSubscriptionConfigurationBuilder,​ClusterSubscriptionConfiguration>

    public static final class ClusterSubscriptionConfiguration.ClusterSubscriptionConfigurationBuilder

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      ClusterSubscriptionConfiguration build()  
      protected ClusterSubscriptionConfiguration.ClusterSubscriptionConfigurationBuilder self()  
      ClusterSubscriptionConfiguration.ClusterSubscriptionConfigurationBuilder subscription​(ClusterSubscriptionConfiguration.PubSubClusterChannelMode mode, GlideString channelOrPattern)
      Add a subscription to a channel or to multiple channels if ClusterSubscriptionConfiguration.PubSubClusterChannelMode.PATTERN is used.
      See ClusterSubscriptionConfiguration.subscriptions.
      ClusterSubscriptionConfiguration.ClusterSubscriptionConfigurationBuilder subscription​(ClusterSubscriptionConfiguration.PubSubClusterChannelMode mode, java.lang.String channelOrPattern)
      Add a subscription to a channel or to multiple channels if ClusterSubscriptionConfiguration.PubSubClusterChannelMode.PATTERN is used.
      See ClusterSubscriptionConfiguration.subscriptions.
      ClusterSubscriptionConfiguration.ClusterSubscriptionConfigurationBuilder subscriptions​(ClusterSubscriptionConfiguration.PubSubClusterChannelMode mode, java.util.Set<GlideString> subscriptions)
      Set subscriptions in a bulk for the given mode.
      ClusterSubscriptionConfiguration.ClusterSubscriptionConfigurationBuilder subscriptions​(java.util.Map<ClusterSubscriptionConfiguration.PubSubClusterChannelMode,​java.util.Set<GlideString>> subscriptions)
      Set all subscriptions in a bulk.

        Add a subscription to a channel or to multiple channels if ClusterSubscriptionConfiguration.PubSubClusterChannelMode.PATTERN is used.

      • subscriptions

        public ClusterSubscriptionConfiguration.ClusterSubscriptionConfigurationBuilder subscriptions​(java.util.Map<ClusterSubscriptionConfiguration.PubSubClusterChannelMode,​java.util.Set<GlideString>> subscriptions)
        Set all subscriptions in a bulk. Rewrites previously stored configurations.
        See ClusterSubscriptionConfiguration.subscriptions.

      • subscriptions

        public ClusterSubscriptionConfiguration.ClusterSubscriptionConfigurationBuilder subscriptions​(ClusterSubscriptionConfiguration.PubSubClusterChannelMode mode,
                                                                                              java.util.Set<GlideString> subscriptions)
        Set subscriptions in a bulk for the given mode. Rewrites previously stored configurations for that mode.
        See ClusterSubscriptionConfiguration.subscriptions.
